name: prompt closed-loop end-to-end reports a per-step status summary for the entire chain
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/prompts/closed-loop-test.sh" --end-to-end --emit summary 2>out.txt && grep -q 'step=registry' out.txt && grep -q 'step=eval' out.txt && grep -q 'step=ab' out.txt && grep -q 'step=promote' out.txt && grep -q 'step=rationale' out.txt && grep -q 'step=perf' out.txt && grep -q 'step=audit-trail' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
